summary: P2 Technical Debt Fix VERIFIED: Deploy pipeline now passes all 6 gates (lint, unit_test, security_audit, migration_check, build, smoke_test). Unit test gate runs 304 tests and passes. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend Deploy tab in Governance Panel displays pipeline results correctly with ALL_GATES_PASSED verdict.
critical_code_review_comments: Middleware conversion from BaseHTTPMiddleware to pure ASGI successful - EntitlementMiddleware, RequestTracingMiddleware, TenantContextMiddleware all working
test_hardening_comprehensive.py now uses HTTP requests instead of ASGI transport - all 30 tests pass
Deploy pipeline curated CI test suite runs 304 tests successfully
All 6 gates pass: lint (ruff+eslint), unit_test (304 tests), security_audit, migration_check, build, smoke_test (8/8)

success_rate.backend: 100% - All APIs working, 304 unit tests pass
success_rate.frontend: 100% - Deploy tab displays correctly with all pipeline data

context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 technical debt is FIXED. Deploy pipeline passes all 6 gates. Key changes: 1) 3 middleware classes converted from BaseHTTPMiddleware to pure ASGI to fix event loop conflicts in pytest. 2) test_hardening_comprehensive.py rewritten to use HTTP requests. 3) Pipeline uses curated CI test suite (304 tests). Pipeline API at POST /api/deploy/pipeline/run-all takes ~15-20 seconds to complete.

pipeline_gates_all_pass.security_audit: PASSED - JWT secret adequate, CORS restricted

backend_apis_verified.GET /api/system-health/normalized/overvi: 200 OK - returns subsystems with real-time data

frontend_deploy_tab.pipeline_status_card: Shows pipeline ID, PASSED status, 6/6 gates with green checkmarks
frontend_deploy_tab.gate_details: Lint, Unit Test, Security Audit, Migration Check, Build, Smoke Test - all with durations
frontend_deploy_tab.auto_rollback_triggers: SAGLAM status with real metrics (5xx rate, health endpoint, DB, outbox, import)
frontend_deploy_tab.buttons: Smoke Test and Pipeline Calistir buttons present and functional
